title: Medicare and private health insurance
description: Find out about the Medicare levy, Medicare levy surcharge and private health insurance.
keywords: Medicare, medicare levy, medicare levy exemption, medicare exemption, medicare levy surcharge, medicare surcharge, private health, insurance, health

child_links.title: Medicare levy

child_links.title: Private health insurance rebate
child_links.description: The private health insurance rebate is a government contribution to help with the cost of your private health insurance.
